{{Infobox character
| name = Sha Relliar
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Wintersteel (novel)|Wintersteel]]
}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sha Relliar]] is [[Sha Miara]]'s [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Sha Relliar]] is a [[Herald]] and the Right Hand of the [[Luminous Queen]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Sha Relliar]] is [[Sha Miara]]'s uncle.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
